improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try three free searches, then unlock full membership from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the pricing starting point and key features (voice chat, workspace) differentiates Gideon from generic AI tools without making unverified claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately establishes Gideon's purpose and the AI benefit, while the subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) and removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no payment barrier. The professional tone aligns with the target audience of business owners and traders.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, with flexible monthly or annual billing options—annual plans save you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and professional assistance whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point for trial users—what happens when free access ends. It transparently explains the paywall, reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), and anchors on the low daily price to reduce sticker shock. Clarity here builds trust and reduces drop-off at the conversion moment.
